_meta.rc_architecture: FusionMirror v0.1 uses a reinforced-concrete architecture: config.json acts as rebar for thresholds, device conditions, and persisted state; app.py acts as concrete for execution logic.
_meta.local_only_policy: All audio capture and Whisper transcription are executed on the local machine. No external API calls are expected in this MVP.
_meta.documentation: See README_config.md for field-by-field rationale, tuning guidance, and recommended values.

whisper.initial_prompt: Koji Tokuda, Nakata, Ōokayama, FUSIONDRIVER. This is a business meeting involving Japanese names and locations.
